hero.title: A Premium Showroom Experience
hero.body: Explore curated furniture, walk through spaces in VR, and witness high-impact laser presentations — all under one roof.

items.title: Projection Walkthroughs
items.desc: Walk through projected floor plans at scale. See spatial layouts come alive with high-precision projectors in our showroom studio.

items.title: Curated Interior & Furniture
items.desc: Browse a curated catalog of premium furniture — see pieces in context, touch materials, and make confident decisions before you commit.

items.title: VR Walkthrough Sessions
items.desc: Book a private session in our showroom. Walk through your future space at full scale in immersive VR — feel every detail before it's built.

brands.title: Brands We Offer
brands.subtitle: We partner with leading manufacturers to bring you the finest in contemporary furniture and interiors.

items.name: Sira Cucine
items.desc: The Sira kitchens are part of the daily experience of many families, in Italy and around the world.

items.name: Atelier Nieri
items.desc: Italian family business producing high-end living rooms for over 90 years.

reserve_cta.title: Reserve your session at the STEP IN Gallery
reserve_cta.body: Book an immersive walkthrough session for your team or clients today. Experience the power of spatial design firsthand.

contact_modal.title: Request a Session
contact_modal.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll be in touch to confirm your booking.
contact_modal.message_placeholder: Tell us about your project or any questions you have
contact_modal.success_message: Thank you — we'll confirm your session shortly.
